content.en:
"According to the information of the Nine-Story Building, the life elves only operate in this area!"

Ye Tian quickly frowned.

This area is very dangerous, and it is often infested with half-step Yae Ancestor-level primordial antiquities.

With his half-step cultivation of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm, it can be said that it is very dangerous to enter here.

Of course, he is not afraid of danger, but he is afraid that he will not be able to find the life elf, and he is also afraid that he will not be able to kill the life elf.

The vitality of the Life Spirit is too strong, and it also causes the recovery of the Life Spirit to be very terrifying, even more powerful than the recovery ability of the original antiquity!

So, hunting life elves is difficult.

"Even if you fail dozens of times, you only need to succeed once!"

So on this day, Ye Tian asked a replica body to go to the front of the Hanhai Wind Belt.

"This is the area!"

Ye Tian escaped directly into it, and then urged the Wind Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu to merge into the wind of the Hanhai Wind Belt.

Next, Ye Tian kept looking for the location of the life elf.

"Yuan Shen Golden Bone!"

"White Yang Bone!"

"Wind Sea Stone!"

Ye Tian saw one primordial antiquity after another, and some of them also gave birth to real good things, even to the sevenfold primordial ancestor.

Unfortunately, his purpose was the Life Spirits, so he didn't attack these primordial artifacts.

Finally on this day, Ye Tian sensed the existence of the life spirit.

It was a little green treeman.

"Found it, the life spirit of the early stage of the Sevenfold Ancestor is a little powerful!"

Ye Tian hesitated for a moment and decided to give it a try.

He hadn't fought against Life Elves, so he didn't know the strength of them.

This time, he didn't expect to kill the life spirit of the early stage of the Sevenfold Ancestor, it was almost unrealistic, it was just a test.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian instantly struck out, casting an endless golden spear, which suddenly appeared from the wind, and a blow pierced through the body of this life elf.

However, useless!

This life spirit quickly recovered and fought with Ye Tian.

"The combat power is very weak, not strong!"

Ye Tian judged.

However, the recovery power of this life spirit is indeed terrifying, he has broken this life spirit again and again, and it can recover perfectly.

In the end, Ye Tian gave up and left here directly.

However, he was soon targeted by a large number of primordial antiquities.

If the Hanhai Wind drives the hand, it will cause such a situation, and it will be surrounded and killed by a large number of primordial antiquities.

Unless it is an instant kill of the original antiquity, it will not affect much of the waves, then it will have no effect.

And the battle he had just had fluctuated too much, which naturally attracted the attention of countless primordial antiquities around him.

Following his instincts, these primordial antiquities naturally wouldn't let him go.

In the end, Ye Tian still didn't hide, and was directly killed by a half-step eightfold ancestor-level primordial artifact.

......

"The temptation is clear, I can't kill the sevenfold ancestor-level life elves, but I should be able to kill those half-step sevenfold ancestor-level life elves!"

So, Ye Tian copied a replica body again and went to the Hanhai Wind Belt.

This time, Ye Tian was lucky, and it took some time to finally find a half-step sevenfold ancestor-level life elf.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian went all out and used the Endless Golden Spear of the Little Perfection Yuan Dao Control Skill Level, and with one blow, the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor Level Life Spirit directly collapsed.

However, the life spirit's ability to recover is indeed terrifying, and it still did not die under such an attack.

Under the second blow, this life spirit was killed by Ye Tian.

After the death of this life elf, it left behind a life source orb.

Wow!

Ye Tian grabbed the Life Source Bead, and immediately used the extreme speed of Yuan Dun to quickly escape from here.

......

Hanhai Yellow Building.

The Life Source Bead was sent here, and then it was used by Ye Tian to raise the level of life.

"Try the effect of this Life Source Bead!"

Ye Tian began to refine, absorbing the energy of the Life Source Bead to improve his life level.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's life level was rising by a very slight margin.

It didn't take long for the Life Source Orb to run out.

Subsequently, Ye Tian tested the life level in the Hanhai Yellow Building.

"It's still 6.5!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

But if you think about it carefully, if a half-step Sevenfold Ancestral Life Spirit Life Source Bead can raise the life level from 6.5 to 6.6, then it will be too easy to raise the life level!

"It is estimated that it takes a lot of life source beads to increase the life level by more than 0.1!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the following years, Ye Tian entered the Hanhai Wind Belt again and again, and there were many failures, but occasionally he could succeed, and that was fine.

Gradually, Ye Tian obtained a large number of life source beads, and his life level was slowly improving.

6.6！

6.7！

6.8！

......

After a long time, Ye Tian also refined a large number of life source beads, and finally raised the life level to the 7.1 life level.

And at this time, the half-step sevenfold ancestor-level life source bead had no effect on him at all.

There is only a life elf at the level of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and his life-saving ability is too terrifying, if he is given enough time, he can kill the life elf in the early stage of the Sevenfold Ancestor.

However, once he had fought for a long time and other primordial artifacts besieged him, he would not be able to resist.

Therefore, with his current strength, it would be almost impossible to kill a Sevenfold Ancestor-level Life Spirit!

"For the time being, I can only give up the life elf, and I have to choose other ways to improve my life level!"

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to take over the task of the Nine-Story Building, obtain points, and then go to the treasure land of the Nine-Story Building to practice and improve the level of life.

Subsequently, Ye Tian checked the tasks of the Nine Floors, and those tasks that he couldn't complete were directly ignored, and only looked at the tasks that he hoped to complete.

"Looking for the Jade Dao Ancestor, Location: Hanhai District Boundary, with the Primordial Ancient Treasure of shielding and exploration, cultivation is: Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Peak, Mission Requirements: Find the trace and report it to the Xuanlou, you can get 300 points, and you can get 3000 points for killing!"

This task gets a lot of points, and the Nine-Story Building, many of the tasks of the Yellow Building, are only a few dozen points.

Therefore, Ye Tian wanted to complete this task.

But he couldn't kill the other party!

"No, there is still hope, if I unite with Gu Mountain Dao Ancestor, I should be able to kill the other party. This kind of task is a task for official members, and peripheral members are not qualified to accept the task, I can give Gu Mountain Daozu some points at that time, and he should be able to help me kill the other party. That way, I can get more points!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Of course, all this is premised on him being able to find the other party.
